_comment: Normalized payload contract (INT-007): every hook command that dispatches to a skill MUST expose the following env vars so skill bodies receive a consistent interface — EVENT (e.g. SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, Stop), PROJECT (active project tag from state.json, or empty string if not resolvable), TIMESTAMP (ISO-8601 UTC, e.g. $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)). Claude Code provides USER_PROMPT for UserPromptSubmit hooks. Hooks are responsible for resolving and exporting these before invoking any skill.

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -f ~/.squirrel/state.json ]; then echo "💡 squirrel: detected a previous session. Run /sq-start to resume context, or /sq-where-am-i for a diagnostic."; fi'
bash -c 'if echo "$USER_PROMPT" | grep -q "<!-- SQUIRREL-PACKAGE"; then echo "📦 Package detected — the squirrel:sync-in skill will process it."; fi'

bash -c 'if echo "$USER_PROMPT" | grep -iE "(decid(í|imos)|elegí|vamos a usar|let'\''s go with|concluimos)" > /dev/null; then echo "💡 Detected decision language. Consider /sq-decision to capture it as an ADR."; fi'

bash -c 'if echo "$USER_PROMPT" | grep -iE "(mandar update|update a @|email a (mi lead|sarah|el equipo)|standup)" > /dev/null; then echo "💡 If you're about to communicate status, run /sq-brief to generate it structured."; fi'

bash -c 'if [ -f ~/.squirrel/state.json ]; then SESSION_AGE=$(($(date +%s) - $(stat -c %Y ~/.squirrel/state.json 2>/dev/null || stat -f %m ~/.squirrel/state.json))); if [ $SESSION_AGE -gt 1800 ]; then echo "⏰ Session >30min with no shutdown. Consider /sq-end to save context."; fi; fi'
